creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->repocopy

Dear portmgr, 

To update the isc-dhcp3-xxx range of ports, please repocopy... 

net/isc-dhcp3-server to net/isc-dhcp30-server 
to net/isc-dhcp31-server 
to net/isc-dhcp40-server 
net/isc-dhcp3-client to net/isc-dhcp30-client 
to net/isc-dhcp31-client 
to net/isc-dhcp40-client 
net/isc-dhcp3-relay to net/isc-dhcp30-relay 
to net/isc-dhcp31-relay 
to net/isc-dhcp40-relay 

After that I will update isc-dhcp30-xxx to 3.0.7, 
isc-dhcp31-xxxx to 3.1.1 and isc-dhcp40-server to 4.0.0.
